# init(data:)

**Initializer**

Initializes and returns the receiver, specifying the initial content data.

## Declaration

```swift
init!(data: Data!)
```

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebArchive/data] method to get the receiver’s data.

## Initializing

- **init(mainResource:subresources:subframeArchives:)**: Initializes the receiver with a resource and optional subresources and subframe archives..
